messages: How can I get ink out of a shirt with common household items if I don't have a stain remover?
Logistics check: which application should I open on my laptop to join the meeting?
Of the two people on the invite, which one was responsible for making hiring decisions so I know who to direct role-fit questions to?
For the hands-on portion, did they specify whether I should be ready to share my screen or just talk through the examples?
What time did the invite put the session at again? I want to set an alarm to get online a bit early.
And when choosing which projects to discuss, should I focus more on measurable product impact or process improvements - what were they asking me to emphasize?
